title: nf-100GMX-variant-summarizer
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"505i4","text":"Nextflow pipeline used to count variants for the 100GMX project","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bv0uj","text":" 'nf-100GMX-variant-summarizer' is a pipeline tool that counts variants in a VEPextended annotated VCF file.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4m46b","text":"This pipeline generates 3 outputs:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cbf89","text":"1) a TSV file with the total number of SNV and indels","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"16od9","text":"2) a TSV file with per sample counts for variants of type SNV, indel, novel, worldwide singletons, clinvar, gwascat and pharmgkb","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"18qcb","text":"3) a PDF file with the number of discernible variants in sample groups of interest.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5leir","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"a1o6b","text":"Important note: input file must be previously annotated by https://github.com/Iaguilaror/nf-VEPextended","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":59,"length":44}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"563C3E54EF0C11EA9C170A58A9FEAC2A","url":"https://github.com/Iaguilaror/nf-VEPextended"}}}}

steps: Project Counts a) Count samples and raw stats for all samples. b) Give the total counts data.
No filter counts a) Filter variants that are not in ClinVar, GWAS Catalog or PGKB. b) Give the total counts data. Dependencies: final-counter.R bcftools 1.9
Novel counts a) Filter variants without a rsID. b) Give the total counts data. Dependencies: final-counter.R bcftools 1.9
Worldwide singletons counts a) Filter variants that are singletons. b) Keep variants that have not frequencies in another population. Dependencies: final-counter.R bcftools 1.9 filter_vep 96 & 97
ClinVar counts a) Filter variants harbored in CinVar. b) Give the total counts data. Dependencies: final-counter.R filter_vep 96 & 97 bcftools 1.9
GWASCatalog counts a) Filter variants harbored in GWAS Catalog. b) Give the total counts data. Dependencies: final-counter.R bcftools 1.9 filter_vep 96 & 97
PGKB counts a) Filter variants harbored in Pharm GKB. b) Give the total counts data. Dependencies: final-counter.R bcftools 1.9 filter_vep 96 & 97
Merge tables Merge tables of counted data. Dependencies: merger.R
Define groups a) Count samples per group. b) Join in a file samples per group. Dependencies: NONE
Select world rare a) Filter variants according AF in gnomAD populations and NatMex. Dependencies: filter_vep 96 & 97
Extract discernible VCF a) Extract variants in other samples. b) Extract variants in local samples. c) Extract exclusive variants. Dependencies: bcftools 1.9
Count and Plot a) Count the number of discernible variants per group and type in a TSV file. b) Plot number of discernible variants per group and type. Dependencies: bcftools 1.9 plotter.R
creator: Judith Ballesteros Villascan
